/CAL: STATUS OF RELEASE CONDITIONS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE ON OR, THEDEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,//DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS AND SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE (HOME DETENTION) UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE/X:SEE SIGNED ORDERIN FILE,/X: THE 06-16-22 HEARING IS CONFIRMED,/

/CAL: DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY CONDITIONS OF RELEASE/DEF: APPEARING VIA ZOOM/MO GRTD/EMTERM/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN THE INTERIOR PREMESIS OF RESIDENCE FROM 8PM TO 8AM EVERY DAY/CTORD: DO NOT CONSUME ANY ALCOHOL OR DRUGS/CONTD: STATUS OF RELEASE CONDITIONS/DOP/
/CAL: TO SET/X: DEFENSE COUNSEL APPEARS OVER ZOOM TODAY/CTORD: NEEDS TO FILL OUT GENERAL APPEARANCE FORM AT NEXT CALLING/STWPX/CTORD: DEFENDANT TOSTAY COMPLIANT WITH ALL PREVIOUS TERMS/CONT/DOP/

/CAL: DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/MO DENIED/NTW60/LDPX: 03-21-22 (60)/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO BE ON HOME DETENTION, APPROVED HOME DETENTION ACTIVITIES ARE WORK & THERAPY//X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: TO SET/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/X: DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL AND ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS SUBMITTED IN SUPPORT THEREOF FILED,/TN: MICHAEL GIRONVALLADARES/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:02-03-22 (10), 03-07-22 (30), 03-21-22 (60)/NB/CTORD: WITHOUT PREJUDICE/SAORD/SA1: DAVID BRUNN, 50 YEAR OLD MALE/SAORD2/SAORD3/CTORD: THE PROTECTED PERSON MAY RECORD ANY PROHIBITED COMMUNICATIONS MADE BY THE RESTRAINED PERSON/CONTD: HEARING ON DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/DOP/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL: FINAL TO SET/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/X: ZOOM OK,/
/CAL: TO SET/CONTD: FINAL TO SET/DOP/
